title: pleopeltis coronans
intro: Pleopeltis coronans, also known as the crown-of-thorns club moss, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis coronans include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Pleopeltis coronans can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts to create topical ointments or creams.
